title: Trump Letter to Congress Justifying Iran Strikes Outlines No Imminent Threat
author: Megan Mineiro
fullText: The president told lawmakers that the objective of the assault was to “neutralize Iran’s malign activities,” but did not present evidence of immediate plans by Tehran to attack the United States.
summary: The president told lawmakers that the objective of the assault was to “neutralize Iran’s malign activities,” but did not present evidence of immediate plans by Tehran to attack the United States.
